'''yahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rumbunctiously|rumbunctiously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rumbunctiously|rumbunctiously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yahate|yahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yahatesher|yahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahatesherĂ«m|yahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yahatero|yahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yahateshĂ«|yahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahateshĂ«m|yahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyahatero|gokiyahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyahateshĂ«|gokiyahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahateshĂ«m|gokiyahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyahankerom|goyahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyahankeshĂ«|goyahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahankeshĂ«m|goyahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyahankeya|goyahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yahaterom|yahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahatemu|yahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yahateya|yahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyahaterom|gokiyahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahatemu|gokiyahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyahateya|gokiyahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yahahate|yahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yahahatesher|yahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahahatesherĂ«m|yahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yahahatero|yahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yahahateshĂ«|yahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahahateshĂ«m|yahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyahahatero|gokiyahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyahahateshĂ«|gokiyahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahahateshĂ«m|gokiyahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyahahankerom|goyahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyahahankeshĂ«|goyahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahahankeshĂ«m|goyahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyahahankeya|goyahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yahahaterom|yahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahahatemu|yahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yahahateya|yahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyahahaterom|gokiyahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahahatemu|gokiyahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyahahateya|gokiyahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠte|yĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠtesher|yĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠtero|yĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠhĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠhĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠhĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠterom|yĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠtemu|yĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠteya|yĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠhĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠhĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafhafte|yafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafhaftesher|yafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafhaftesherĂ«m|yafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafhaftero|yafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafhafteshĂ«|yafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafhafteshĂ«m|yafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafhaftero|gokiyafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafhafteshĂ«|gokiyafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafhafteshĂ«m|gokiyafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafhafnkerom|goyafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafhafnkeshĂ«|goyafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafhafnkeshĂ«m|goyafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafhafnkeya|goyafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafhafterom|yafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafhaftemu|yafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafhafteya|yafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafhafterom|gokiyafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafhaftemu|gokiyafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafhafteya|gokiyafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
